# OpenSet

> Open, sport-agnostic JSON standard for structured training workouts and programs. Defines workouts, programs, sets, dimensions, execution modes, and exercise libraries as JSON Schema–validated documents.

## Specification

- [Overview](https://openset.dev/docs/spec/overview): Philosophy, design goals, and quick example of the OpenSet specification
- [Entities](https://openset.dev/docs/spec/entities): Program, Phase, Workout, Block, Series, Exercise, Set
- [Set dimensions](https://openset.dev/docs/spec/set-dimensions): reps, load, duration, power, distance, and other measurable axes
- [Value types](https://openset.dev/docs/spec/value-types): fixed, range, min, amrap, max, any
- [Execution modes](https://openset.dev/docs/spec/execution-modes): SEQUENTIAL, SUPERSET, CIRCUIT, AMRAP, FOR_TIME, INTERVAL, TABATA, EMOM, LADDER, CLUSTER
- [Exercise library](https://openset.dev/docs/spec/exercise-library): Canonical exercise library and how to reference exercises
- [Workout library](https://openset.dev/docs/spec/workout-library): Reusable workout templates
- [Workout execution](https://openset.dev/docs/spec/workout-execution): Optional execution layer — record what was done (session + set-level actuals, timestamps, completion)
- [Extensions](https://openset.dev/docs/spec/extensions): Namespaced extension mechanism for custom dimensions and fields
- [Examples](https://openset.dev/docs/spec/examples): Full workout and program examples in JSON

## Tools

- [Validator](https://openset.dev/docs/tools/validator): CLI and programmatic validator for OpenSet documents
- [TypeScript types](https://openset.dev/docs/tools/typescript-types): @diby/openset-types npm package
- [Code generator](https://openset.dev/docs/tools/codegen): Fluent TypeScript builder for documents
- [Conversion tool](https://openset.dev/docs/tools/conversion): LLM prompt to convert free-text workout descriptions to OpenSet JSON

## Optional

- [FAQ](https://openset.dev/docs/faq): Frequently asked questions and format comparison
- [Contributors](https://openset.dev/docs/contributors): List of contributors
- [GitHub](https://github.com/getdiby/openset): Source code and issue tracker
- [npm org](https://www.npmjs.com/org/diby): @diby/openset-types, @diby/openset-validator, @diby/openset-codegen
